title: PancakeBunny - REKT
relevance_summary: Flash loan followed by price manipulation on PancakeSwap pools

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls getReward() after a series of flash loans in the same tx

red_flags: Series of flash loans followed by price manipulation and reward claiming
monitoring_rules: BLOCK ANY TX THAT CALLS getReward() AFTER A SERIES OF FLASH LOANS IN THE SAME TX
summary: The attacker used flash loans to manipulate the price on PancakeSwap pools, leading to the minting of BUNNY tokens and their subsequent sale, resulting in a loss of $45 million.
